attributes.title: M-26-14 Config Drift & Compliance Posture
attributes.description: Config drift and compliance posture dashboard. Tracks encryption violations, MDM non-compliance, OS version spread, baseline hash diversity, and per-asset compliance status.
attributes.panelsJSON: [{"version": "9.4.2", "type": "lens", "gridData": {"x": 0, "y": 0, "w": 12, "h": 6, "i": "d5-drift-assets"}, "panelIndex": "d5-drift-assets", "embeddableConfig": {"attributes":
